_meta: DEV PLACEHOLDERS — structural world/player/stamina numbers below remain provisional. Hazard/relic/scanner/consumable/throwable balance values are first-pass balanced (see _balanced).
_balanced: 2026-07-05 first-pass balance pass — testable values pending playtesting
_hazards_meta: FIRST-PASS BALANCED 2026-07-05 — hazards forgiving early, spike hard toward Inner Core. Testable, pending playtesting.
_pressure_dps_base_meta: FIRST-PASS BALANCED 2026-07-05; HALVED 2026-07-06 (playtest: too punishing) 6.0 → 3.0. pressure_dps_base × LAYER_DEPTH_FACTOR (0.0/0.2/0.4/0.6/0.8) → Crust 0 / Mantle 0.6 / Outer 1.2 / Inner 1.8 / Core Hollow 2.4 per sec.

depth_hazard._meta: FIRST-PASS BALANCED 2026-07-05; layer DPS HALVED 2026-07-06 (playtest: too punishing). DPS/oxygen/visibility scale low Crust / moderate Mantle / noticeable Outer Core / high Inner Core; Core Hollow left to the storm. Testable, pending playtesting.
depth_hazard._balance_note: Layer DPS (depth_hazard only), halved 2026-07-06: Crust 0 / Mantle 0.5 / Outer Core 2 / Inner Core 6 / Core Hollow 0 (was 0/1/4/12/0). Combined with pressure this yields the intended forgiving-early, punishing-deep curve. Oxygen drain and pressure_dps_base unchanged.

relic_strength._balance_note: FIRST-PASS BALANCED 2026-07-05 — dramatic while active (~3-4s), per design. Testable, pending playtesting.

consumables._meta: FIRST-PASS BALANCED 2026-07-05 — use times / durations / strengths tuned to be meaningful on a 100 HP player. Testable, pending playtesting.

throwables._meta: FIRST-PASS BALANCED 2026-07-05 — radii / durations / strengths tuned to be meaningful. Testable, pending playtesting. seismic_radius_tiles is in TILES; all other radii in PIXELS.
